name: Data Center & Virtualization
description: Data center design, build, and modernization services including server virtualization (VMware, Hyper-V), containerization (Kubernetes), and hyper-converged infrastructure. Covers physical data center planning, power and cooling, as well as software-defined data center architectures.
differentiators: Full lifecycle from DC design through virtualization to operations
HCI expertise across VMware vSAN, Nutanix, and Azure Stack HCI
Migration services for legacy-to-modern infrastructure transitions
